import { scheduleAsyncIterable } from './scheduleAsyncIterable'; import { readableStreamLikeToAsyncGenerator } from '../util/isReadableStreamLike'; export function scheduleReadableStreamLike(input, scheduler) { return scheduleAsyncIterable(readableStreamLikeToAsyncGenerator(input), scheduler); } //# sourceMappingURL=scheduleReadableStreamLike.js.map
